raw_text:
6. Mold Shop Helper

Job Summary  
Assists mold makers and technicians in mold manufacturing, cleaning, and maintenance 
activities.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Assist in mold assembly and disassembly  
• Clean and maintain molds and compon ents  
• Support machining and polishing operations  
• Handle materials and tools safely  
• Follow shop floor instructions  
Required Skills  
• Basic mechanical skills  
• Physical stamina and teamwork  
• Willingness to learn  
• Safety awareness  
Qualification  
• ITI / Vocatio nal training preferred  
Experience  
• Freshers / 0 –1 year  
Salary (India)  
• ₹8,000 – ₹14,000 per month
